description: AI systems — behavior trees, entity states, blackboard properties, scoring

SequenceNode.description: Runs children in order, fails on first failure

SelectorNode.description: Runs children in order, succeeds on first success

ParallelNode.description: Runs all children simultaneously, configurable success threshold

ConditionalNode.description: If-else branching based on condition function

RepeatNode.description: Repeats child N times or infinitely

SucceederNode.description: Always returns SUCCESS regardless of child result

scoringFactors.description: BehaviorScorer evaluates entity state to determine best action
